meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: C'mon now, heroes! Bring me mojo back and help me put dis old loa in him place!
But don't ya be worryin' 'bout a thing. Ya gonna be havin' plenty a time ta learn from ya mistakes.
Times change, mon. Mortals never be as weak as ya believed 'em ta be. Ya see, dey have... potential.
Ya better watch ya tongue, little ting! Bwonsamdi da bossmon now.
Ya did good, heroes, yeah... But what Mueh'zala got comin' ain't for mortal eyes. Take ya trinkets and begone with ya!
Somethin' strange going on wit' da spirits of da loa restin' up in Ardenweald. Ya go check it out for me, hmm?
Aaaaaaah! You'll be too late. Me gave an ancient spirit the chance to be joining me. They made a bad choice. And now, they be trapped in the mall.
quotes.transcript: Aaaaaaah! You'll be too late. Me gave an ancient spirit the chance to be joining me. They made a bad choice. And now, they be trapped in the mall.

quotes.text: Your time be done, your power be spent, and now all my Zalla be come to collect.
quotes.transcript: Your time be done, your power be spent, and now all my Zalla be come to collect.

quotes.text: Ha ha ha ha ha! Foolish lore! It'll be stopping me, power! First, I'll be feasting on your followers... than you!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha! Foolish lore! It'll be stopping me, power! First, I'll be feasting on your followers... than you!

quotes.text: Ha! Me no bow down to your cheap tricks!
quotes.transcript: Ha! Me no bow down to your cheap tricks!

quotes.text: No! You're just mortals! How is me?
quotes.transcript: No! You're just mortals! How is me?

quotes.text: Some love that you beat, Bwonsamdi. Making deals instead of taking what be ours.
quotes.transcript: Some love that you beat, Bwonsamdi. Making deals instead of taking what be ours.

quotes.text: Once somebody will let mortals fight his battles, we always knew he'd be a coward.
quotes.transcript: Once somebody will let mortals fight his battles, we always knew he'd be a coward.

quotes.text: It'd be Mozalla who brought Hellia to the jailer's side, struck a deal for all Odin's eye, and made a banshee war chief with a whisper.
quotes.transcript: It'd be Mozalla who brought Hellia to the jailer's side, struck a deal for all Odin's eye, and made a banshee war chief with a whisper.

quotes.text: Don't be forget no major lore, one sandy. Now give me them souls, and kneel before your master.
quotes.transcript: Don't be forget no major lore, one sandy. Now give me them souls, and kneel before your master.

quotes.text: We don't need worshippers! The jail are gonna give me all the power I need. And once I'm the one who gonna be forgotten.
quotes.transcript: We don't need worshippers! The jail are gonna give me all the power I need. And once I'm the one who gonna be forgotten.

quotes.text: RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR
quotes.transcript: RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR

quotes.text: So small, so weak!
quotes.transcript: So small, so weak!

quotes.text: Ha! This will be the end of one Sunday! And I-and I-you!
quotes.transcript: Ha! This will be the end of one Sunday! And I-and I-you!

quotes.text: Jana take ya!
quotes.transcript: Jana take ya!

quotes.text: You said the wrong lorra!
quotes.transcript: You said the wrong lorra!

quotes.text: You'll be running to the Winter Queen, with your problems now!
quotes.transcript: You'll be running to the Winter Queen, with your problems now!

quotes.text: Too bad you betrayed all Moazzalla. Now we be enemies.
quotes.transcript: Too bad you betrayed all Moazzalla. Now we be enemies.

quotes.text: He'll be not without me, and when he be done, he gonna be not again.
quotes.transcript: He'll be not without me, and when he be done, he gonna be not again.

quotes.text: Ha ha ha ha ha! Look over coming back to his little necropolis. You're scaring me, follow us, gon' tear it down.
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha! Look over coming back to his little necropolis. You're scaring me, follow us, gon' tear it down.

quotes.text: Me four seas be here to free me! And then you're gonna be real sorry.
quotes.transcript: Me four seas be here to free me! And then you're gonna be real sorry.

quotes.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! These little friends of yours think they're gonna help you on one Sunday! What chance you'll be havin' against me!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! These little friends of yours think they're gonna help you on one Sunday! What chance you'll be havin' against me!

quotes.text: Where you be hiding all them Zandalari souls one Sunday? Give them to your boss man now or you gonna be sorry. REAL sorry.
quotes.transcript: Where you be hiding all them Zandalari souls one Sunday? Give them to your boss man now or you gonna be sorry. REAL sorry.

quotes.text: You You You You You
quotes.transcript: You You You You You

quotes.text: You You You You
quotes.transcript: You You You You

quotes.text: You don't be stopping the Jido. Then you work in his plans for a long time. A LONG TIME!
quotes.transcript: You don't be stopping the Jido. Then you work in his plans for a long time. A LONG TIME!

quotes.text: War has been burning this whole world to ashes! All over one! Eekah! Whisper to this foolish troll! Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!
quotes.transcript: War has been burning this whole world to ashes! All over one! Eekah! Whisper to this foolish troll! Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

quotes.text: Oh, you like me whispers little chieftain? Who's gonna send your soul to the mom itself? But you're born to this world, be too hard to break!
quotes.transcript: Oh, you like me whispers little chieftain? Who's gonna send your soul to the mom itself? But you're born to this world, be too hard to break!

quotes.text: Your life be mine!
quotes.transcript: Your life be mine!

quotes.text: There be no escaping dead.
quotes.transcript: There be no escaping dead.

quotes.text: Darkness be mine to command!
quotes.transcript: Darkness be mine to command!

quotes.text: Foolish mortals! Maybe the true god are dead!
quotes.transcript: Foolish mortals! Maybe the true god are dead!

quotes.text: To the mawage of souls! No one be defying Mazzalla!
quotes.transcript: To the mawage of souls! No one be defying Mazzalla!

quotes.text: That'd be some big dog one-sunday, but you'll be nothing before the Gila
quotes.transcript: That'd be some big dog one-sunday, but you'll be nothing before the Gila

quotes.text: Your seed of power may be given me followers once and for all.
quotes.transcript: Your seed of power may be given me followers once and for all.

quotes.text: After all he be doing for Buansamdi, raising him from priests to law, giving him the power debt, now he be using it against me.
quotes.transcript: After all he be doing for Buansamdi, raising him from priests to law, giving him the power debt, now he be using it against me.

quotes.text: We want them swords, Bwonsandi! We want Rastakhan and all the Razandallari! It ain't wise to be holding out on Wazala!
quotes.transcript: We want them swords, Bwonsandi! We want Rastakhan and all the Razandallari! It ain't wise to be holding out on Wazala!

quotes.text: The only power accounts be dead and dead be coming for them all
quotes.transcript: The only power accounts be dead and dead be coming for them all

quotes.text: You You You You You
quotes.transcript: You You You You You

quotes.text: You You You You You
quotes.transcript: You You You You You

quotes.transcript: You You You You

quotes.text: The Shadow Stakeya!
quotes.transcript: The Shadow Stakeya!

quotes.text: That be the best your followers got once a day! Pathetic!
quotes.transcript: That be the best your followers got once a day! Pathetic!

quotes.text: Heh, you always be soft, Bonsangdi. Wicked! Sooner or later you're gonna break. Then the jailer be getting his do.
quotes.transcript: Heh, you always be soft, Bonsangdi. Wicked! Sooner or later you're gonna break. Then the jailer be getting his do.

quotes.text: I'll teach you to mess with genius!
quotes.transcript: I'll teach you to mess with genius!

quotes.text: Power beyond your comprehension!
quotes.transcript: Power beyond your comprehension!

quotes.text: Hah! How's that for some Manastorm mojo?
quotes.transcript: Ha! How is that for some menace, or mojo?

quotes.text: I'm gonna light you... uh, shadow you up!
quotes.transcript: I'm gonna light you a... uh... shadow you up!

quotes.text: Lumbering?! The mighty Millhouse Manastorm has never lumbered a day in life!
quotes.transcript: Lumbering! The mighty Milhouse Manastorm has never lumbered a day in his life!

quotes.text: Now you'll witness my full power for sure!
quotes.transcript: Now you'll witness my full power! For sure!

quotes.text: Ouch! Watch what you're doing, Millificent!
quotes.transcript: Ouch! Watch what you're doing, Maleficent!

quotes.text: Stop! I'd rather give up the mojo than lose her!
quotes.transcript: STOP! I'd rather give up the mojo than lose her!

quotes.text: You're the best, Milly! Let's never fight again!
quotes.transcript: You're the best, Millie! Let's never fight again! For a while, at least.

quotes.text: Thanks a lot. You have no idea what you unleashed upon the world today!
quotes.transcript: Thanks a lot. You have no idea what you unleashed upon the world today!

quotes.text: I'm gonna light you up, sweet cheeks!
quotes.transcript: I'm gonna light you up, sweet cheeks!

quotes.text: All right! Who ordered up an extra large can of whoop ass?
quotes.transcript: All right! Who ordered up an extra large can of whoop ass?

quotes.text: All right! Who ordered up an extra large can of whoop ass?
quotes.transcript: All right! Who ordered up an extra large can of whoop ass?

quotes.text: I just need to get some things ready first. You guys go ahead and get started. I need to summon up some water.
quotes.transcript: I just need to get some things ready first. You guys go ahead and get started. I need to summon up some water.

quotes.text: BLAST! I'm not your friend anymore!
quotes.transcript: BLAST! I'm not your friend anymore!

quotes.text: You will all be my slaves! Uh, I mean, uh, hi.
quotes.transcript: You will all be my slaves! Uh, I mean, uh, hi.

quotes.text: What have we here? That dusty old Lowa has sent debt collectors already, but I haven't had his mojo long enough to create my masterpiece.
quotes.transcript: What have we here? That dusty old Lowa has sent debt collectors already, but I haven't had his mojo long enough to create my masterpiece.

quotes.text: And of course I'll need some mana. You guys are gonna love this! Just wait!
quotes.transcript: And of course I'll need some mana. You guys are gonna love this! Just wait!

quotes.text: You guys feel free to jump in anytime!
quotes.transcript: You guys feel free to jump in anytime!

quotes.text: Follow me if you dare!
quotes.transcript: Follow me if you dare!

quotes.text: We're in Bonzo's brass buttons, am I? And who are y- AHHHHH! Ho-ho-ho-ho! That is one mother of a headache.
quotes.transcript: We're in Bonzo's brass buttons, am I? And who are y- AHHHHH! Ho-ho-ho-ho! That is one mother of a headache.

quotes.text: Loli, I don't care who you are, friend. No one refers to the mighty Milhouse Manastorm as Loli. I have no idea what goes on here, but I will gladly join your fight against this impudent imbecile. Prepare to defend yourself, Cretan!
quotes.transcript: Loli, I don't care who you are, friend. No one refers to the mighty Milhouse Manastorm as Loli. I have no idea what goes on here, but I will gladly join your fight against this impudent imbecile. Prepare to defend yourself, Cretan!

quotes.text: Oh buttons, what have you done? Hurry, get her back in the cell!
quotes.transcript: Oh buttons, what have you done? Hurry, get her back in the cell!

quotes.text: Finally! The Nightborne Soul Stone! Oh, mine! I mean, ours, of course!
quotes.transcript: Finally! The Nightborne Soul Stone! Oh, mine! I mean, ours, of course!

quotes.text: Am I bleeding? Is that blood?
quotes.transcript: Am I bleeding? Is that blood?

quotes.text: TAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
quotes.transcript: TAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

quotes.text: A technical retreat, eh?
quotes.transcript: A technical retreat, eh?

quotes.text: The fragment is now in the Dragon's custody, ma'am!
quotes.transcript: The fragment is now in the Dragon's custody, ma'am!

quotes.text: Aha! I've got you right where I want you! No!
quotes.transcript: Aha! I've got you right where I want you! No!

quotes.text: Witness the full power of Milhouse Manistorm!
quotes.transcript: Witness the full power of Milhouse Manistorm!

quotes.text: Fantastic! Next, some protective spells. Yes! Now we're cooking!
quotes.transcript: Fantastic! Next, some protective spells. Yes! Now we're cooking!

quotes.text: You'll be hearing from my lawyer.
quotes.transcript: You'll be hearing from my lawyer.

quotes.text: Who's bad? Who's bad? Huh? That's right. We bad.
quotes.transcript: Who's bad? Who's bad? Huh? That's right. We bad.

quotes.text: Ice! Ice, baby!
quotes.transcript: Ice! Ice, baby!

quotes.text: Heal me! Oh, for the love of all the toly! Heal me! I'm dying!
quotes.transcript: Heal me! Oh, for the love of all the toly! Heal me! I'm dying!

quotes.text: I didn't even break a sweat on that one!
quotes.transcript: I didn't even break a sweat on that one!

quotes.text: Oh boy! You really did it!
quotes.transcript: Oh boy! You really did it!

quotes.text: Maybe we could bleep past the barrier!
quotes.transcript: Maybe we could bleep past the barrier!

quotes.text: No! He will NOT get away with this!
quotes.transcript: No! He will NOT get away with this!

quotes.text: I hardly broke a sweat.
quotes.transcript: I hardly broke a sweat.

quotes.text: A most minor setback. I must catch my breath.
quotes.transcript: A most minor setback. I must catch my breath.

quotes.text: Don't say I didn't warn ya!
quotes.transcript: Don't say I didn't warn ya!

quotes.text: Well, I uh... Hey, hold on a minute! You just admitted to doing the same thing I did! Hippocrite!
quotes.transcript: Well, I uh... Hey, hold on a minute! You just admitted to doing the same thing I did! Hippocrite!

quotes.text: Um, if you don't mind me asking, how did we manage to recover the fragment? How did we infiltrate our enemy's forces without their knowledge?
quotes.transcript: Um, if you don't mind me asking, how did we manage to recover the fragment? How did we infiltrate our enemy's forces without their knowledge?

quotes.text: Of course, ma'am! At once!
quotes.transcript: Of course, ma'am! At once!

quotes.text: You're gonna be sorry!
quotes.transcript: You're gonna be sorry!

quotes.text: Don't say I didn't warn ya!
quotes.transcript: Don't say I didn't warn ya!

quotes.text: Prison taught me one very important lesson. Well too if you count how to hold your soap. But yes, survival!
quotes.transcript: Prison taught me one very important lesson. Well too if you count how to hold your soap. But yes, survival!

quotes.text: I'm gonna light you up, sweet cheeks!
quotes.transcript: I'm gonna light you up, sweet cheeks!

quotes.text: Now scrap those pesky rocket chickens! They're going to fire!
quotes.transcript: Now scrap those pesky rocket chickens! They're going to fire!

quotes.text: Quick, disarm her squirrel bombs before they blow!
quotes.transcript: Quick, disarm her squirrel bombs before they blow!

quotes.text: Hey there! I was just enjoying a relaxing vacation on the beach, when a chilling sense of dread washed over me. Just what are you up to, I wonder.
quotes.transcript: Hey there! I was just enjoying a relaxing vacation on the beach, when a chilling sense of dread washed over me. Just what are you up to, I wonder.

quotes.text: Now, make fun of her hair. It won't help, but it'll make her really bad!
quotes.transcript: Now, make fun of her hair. It won't help, but it'll make her really bad!

quotes.text: On a completely unrelated note, I... uh... have to go take care of something.
quotes.transcript: On a completely unrelated note, I... uh... have to go take care of something.

quotes.text: That's not even my middle name!
quotes.transcript: That's not even my middle name!

quotes.text: Listen, Millie. I can explain.
quotes.transcript: Listen, Millie. I can explain.

quotes.text: Hey you, help a fellow mage out! That demon Norvir has the key!
quotes.transcript: Hey you, help a fellow mage out! That demon Norvir has the key!

quotes.text: That was a bit of a pickle. Thanks. You must be the one I've been hearing so much about lately.
quotes.transcript: That was a bit of a pickle. Thanks. You must be the one I've been hearing so much about lately.

quotes.text: You and I are gonna make a great team! Let's blow this place up!
quotes.transcript: You and I are gonna make a great team! Let's blow this place up!

quotes.text: Uh oh, it looks like the inner vault has been breached! We'd better see if the Nightborne Soul Stone has been taken!
quotes.transcript: Uh oh, it looks like the inner vault has been breached! We'd better see if the Nightborne Soul Stone has been taken!

quotes.text: Blast! It's gone! That Varghath is going to be sorry when I catch up with him!
quotes.transcript: Blast! It's gone! That Varghath is going to be sorry when I catch up with him!

quotes.text: He was here very recently. He can't have gotten too far ahead.
quotes.transcript: He was here very recently. He can't have gotten too far ahead.

quotes.text: I'm going to find that soul stone if it's the LESS THING I DO!
quotes.transcript: I'm going to find that soul stone if it's the LESS THING I DO!

quotes.text: Once I get that soul stone, nobody will be able to stop me!
quotes.transcript: Once I get that soul stone, nobody will be able to stop me!

quotes.text: Now that is a fancy weapon! You should let me borrow it sometime.
quotes.transcript: Now that is a fancy weapon! You should let me borrow it sometime.

quotes.text: Of course, if I had a fancy weapon like yours, I'd be running this place! And much more competently, I might add.
quotes.transcript: Of course, if I had a fancy weapon like yours, I'd be running this place! And much more competently, I might add.

quotes.text: Did you know the Nightborne Soul Stone can be used to control millions of people? I'm sure going to have some fun when I get it!
quotes.transcript: Did you know the Nightborne Soul Stone can be used to control millions of people? I'm sure going to have some fun when I get it!

quotes.text: Vargoth and his limited intellect will never be able to unlock the Soul Stone's full potential. I'm the only one who can really show you what it can do.
quotes.transcript: Vargoth and his limited intellect will never be able to unlock the Soul Stone's full potential. I'm the only one who can really show you what it can do.

quotes.text: What? The Nightborne Soul Stone is mine! Let's go get it!
quotes.transcript: What? The Nightborne Soul Stone is mine! Let's go get it!

quotes.text: It's painfully obvious that you could use someone of my considerable talent. Let us join forces to go after Varghath and the Soul Stone.
quotes.transcript: It's painfully obvious that you could use someone of my considerable talent. Let us join forces to go after Varghath and the Soul Stone.

quotes.text: You face Milhouse the Magnificent!
quotes.transcript: You face Milhouse the Magnificent!

quotes.text: I will obliterate and disintegrate and exterminate and... Did I say obliterate?
quotes.transcript: I will obliterate and disintegrate and exterminate and... Did I say obliterate?

quotes.text: This one's mine!
quotes.transcript: This one's mine!

quotes.text: I've killed cockroaches bigger than that!
quotes.transcript: I've killed cockroaches bigger than that!

quotes.text: I can do this in my sleep.
quotes.transcript: I can do this in my sleep.

quotes.text: You will totally regret this when I'm the boss. I mean, you totally won't regret this, boss.
quotes.transcript: You will totally regret this when I'm the boss. I mean, you totally won't regret this, boss.

quotes.text: Don't say I didn't warn ya!
quotes.transcript: Don't say I didn't warn ya!

quotes.text: I'm holding myself back for now!
quotes.transcript: I'm holding myself back for now!

quotes.text: What? Stop that!
quotes.transcript: What? Stop that!

quotes.text: Till you later! I mean, bye!
quotes.transcript: Till you later! I mean, bye!

quotes.text: If you have any excess priceless artifacts that were lost in time, I'm making a collection.
quotes.transcript: If you have any excess priceless artifacts that were lost in time, I'm making a collection.

quotes.text: When do we destroy the world? Soon? I hope it's soon.
quotes.transcript: When do we destroy the world? Soon? I hope it's soon.

quotes.text: Till you later! I mean, bye!
quotes.transcript: Till you later! I mean, bye!

quotes.text: If you have any excess priceless artifacts that were lost in time, I'm making a collection.
quotes.transcript: If you have any excess priceless artifacts that were lost in time, I'm making a collection.

quotes.text: It's time for a technical retreat!
quotes.transcript: It's time for a technical retreat!

quotes.text: Aha! I've got you right where I want you! No!
quotes.transcript: Aha! I've got you right where I want you! No!

quotes.text: Witness the full power of Milhouse Manistorm!
quotes.transcript: Witness the full power of Milhouse Manistorm!

quotes.text: Has-been!
quotes.transcript: Has been!

quotes.text: Awwww sweetie! You DO care!
quotes.transcript: Oh sweetie, you do care!

quotes.text: Are you ready to explode?
quotes.transcript: Are you ready to explode?

quotes.text: Why you? No one insults my hair? No one!
quotes.transcript: Why you? No one insults my hair? No one!

quotes.text: Why you? No one insults my hair? No one!
quotes.transcript: Why you? No one insults my hair? No one!

quotes.text: Then don't get in my way, new house!
quotes.transcript: Then don't get in my way, new house!

quotes.text: Wait, you made a deal with Bonsomdi too? I knew you took shortcuts in your shoddy work, Millhouse, but this is a new low!
quotes.transcript: Wait, you made a deal with Bonsomdi too? I knew you took shortcuts in your shoddy work, Millhouse, but this is a new low!

quotes.text: Waaaaaaaaaah!
quotes.transcript: Waaaaaaaaaah!

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: Here comes the heat!
quotes.transcript: Here comes the heat!

quotes.text: Milhouse! You're next!
quotes.transcript: Milhouse! You're next!

quotes.text: Wait! I recognize that voice!
quotes.transcript: Wait! I recognize that voice!

quotes.text: I know it was you, Millhouse!
quotes.transcript: I know it was you, Millhouse!

quotes.text: There's no place you can hide from me, Millhouse! No place!
quotes.transcript: There's no place you can hide from me, Millhouse! No place!

quotes.text: There's no place you can hide from me, Millhouse! No place!
quotes.transcript: There's no place you can hide from me, Millhouse! No place!

quotes.text: Poultry rains from above!
quotes.transcript: Poultry rains from above!

quotes.text: It's laser time!
quotes.transcript: It's laser time!

quotes.text: This one will drive you nuts!
quotes.transcript: This one will drive you nuts!

quotes.text: Wait! You can have the mojo! New house is more important!
quotes.transcript: Wait! You can have the mojo! New house is more important!

quotes.text: Oh! Hey, that hurt you lumbering oaf!
quotes.transcript: Oh! Hey, that hurt you lumbering oaf!

quotes.text: Are you ready to explode?
quotes.transcript: Are you ready to explode?

quotes.text: Milhouse! You're next!
quotes.transcript: Milhouse! You're next!

quotes.text: Finally free from that cursed mage trap! Such a...
quotes.transcript: Finally free from that cursed mage trap! Such a...

quotes.text: Don't milly me, millhouse tiramisu manastorm! I'm coming for you!
quotes.transcript: Don't milly me, millhouse tiramisu manastorm! I'm coming for you!

quotes.text: Back off, simpletons!
quotes.transcript: Back off, simpletons!

quotes.text: Millhouse clean up this mess so I can get back to work
quotes.transcript: Millhouse clean up this mess so I can get back to work

quotes.text: Here comes the heat!
quotes.transcript: Here comes the heat!

quotes.text: Atalai, rise in service, Ahakar!
quotes.transcript: Atalai, rise in service, Ahakar!

quotes.text: Your blood is weak and unworthy.
quotes.transcript: Your blood is weak and unworthy.

quotes.text: All sacrifices for the soul flayer.
quotes.transcript: All sacrifices for the soul flayer.

quotes.text: My hounds are hungry, and your mages make quite a meal.
quotes.transcript: My hounds are hungry, and your mages make quite a meal.

quotes.text: Soon they will be strong enough to draw the magic out of every major dollar on!
quotes.transcript: Soon they will be strong enough to draw the magic out of every major dollar on!

quotes.text: Once sated, my hands will charge the city, slaughtering everyone in their path.
quotes.transcript: Once sated, my hands will charge the city, slaughtering everyone in their path.

quotes.text: Your blood sustains me.
quotes.transcript: Your blood sustains me.

quotes.text: Face the wrath of the Soulflayer!
quotes.transcript: Face the wrath of the Soulflayer!

quotes.text: The power was mine!
quotes.transcript: The power was mine!

quotes.text: I will be a god of blood and death.
quotes.transcript: I will be a god of blood and death.

quotes.text: Be freed, insects. I will deal with you another time.
quotes.transcript: Be freed, insects. I will deal with you another time.

quotes.text: You overstepped your bounds, Jindal. You toy with powers that are beyond you. Have you forgotten who I am? Have you forgotten what I can do?
quotes.transcript: You overstepped your bounds, Jindal. You toy with powers that are beyond you. Have you forgotten who I am? Have you forgotten what I can do?

quotes.text: You will not interfere with their feeding!
quotes.transcript: You will not interfere with their feeding!

quotes.text: Come my pets, you will have plenty to feed on soon enough.
quotes.transcript: Come my pets, you will have plenty to feed on soon enough.

quotes.text: My minions look forward to making a meal out of you, artsmaids.
quotes.transcript: My minions look forward to making a meal out of you, artsmaids.

quotes.text: Until we meet again.
quotes.transcript: Until we meet again.

quotes.text: You won't pay with your life for what you've done!
quotes.transcript: You won't pay with your life for what you've done!

quotes.text: So we meet again!
quotes.transcript: So we meet again!

quotes.text: Your presence was not accounted for. But I believe my hounds will enjoy making a meal of you, nonetheless.
quotes.transcript: Your presence was not accounted for. But I believe my hounds will enjoy making a meal of you, nonetheless.

quotes.text: When they are done tearing you apart, Lim from Lim, they will begin their feast on the magical prisoners within these cells.
quotes.transcript: When they are done tearing you apart, Lim from Lim, they will begin their feast on the magical prisoners within these cells.

quotes.text: Superman will fall to the betting legion!
